ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 按下按键…（按 Backspace 取消）

ast.name: textContent
ast.target: when:[日期 / 星期 / 时间段]

ast.name: title
ast.source: Don't import now — surface the reminder again later.
ast.target: 现在不导入 — 稍后再次显示提醒。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Apply this color to the selection (without adding to your palette).
ast.target: 将此颜色应用到选区（不添加到调色板）。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Apply and save this color so it appears as a tile next time.
ast.target: 应用并保存此颜色，以便下次显示为色块。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Open the per-folder Stashpad log for the most recent notification's folder.
ast.target: 打开最近通知所在文件夹的 Stashpad 日志。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Action button was shown on the original toast (handler not retained).
ast.target: 操作按钮显示在原始提示上（处理程序未保留）。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Click to bulk-recolor every note of this color in this Stashpad
ast.target: 点击以批量重新着色此 Stashpad 中所有此颜色的笔记

ast.name: title
ast.source: Use both bindings simultaneously (overrides the L/R toggle)
ast.target: 同时使用两个绑定（覆盖左/右切换）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Open this note in a new Stashpad tab
ast.target: 在新的 Stashpad 标签页中打开此笔记

ast.name: title
ast.target: 插入 \"in:\" — 按父笔记筛选。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Open the time-filter builder (Before / On / After / Between).
ast.target: 打开时间筛选构建器（之前 / 当天 / 之后 / 之间）。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Tiny mode — open this tab in a small always-on-top-capable popout window.
ast.target: 微型模式 — 在小型、可置顶的弹出窗口中打开此标签页。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Open this Stashpad in a new tab (clone)
ast.target: 在新标签页中打开此 Stashpad（克隆）

ast.name: title
ast.target: 在 Stashpad 视图中打开

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 区域格式，长 (星期四, 3月5日…)

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 自然排序 (数字 → 字母)

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: \"。已存在的同名笔记将被更新，不会被删除——但如果前缀检测误判了您不想索引的笔记，您最终会得到大量不需要的笔记。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: are updated, never deleted — but if the prefix detection picks up notes you didn't mean to index, you'll end up with a lot of unwanted notes.
ast.target: 会被更新，但从不删除——但如果前缀检测捕获了您本不打算索引的笔记，您最终会得到大量不需要的笔记。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: ". That's a big batch \u2014 if anything looks off, Preview the single-file output first.
ast.target: \"。这是个大批量操作——如果发现任何异常，请先预览单个文件的输出。

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 将 JD 索引构建到 \"

ast.name: error
ast.target: [stashpad] 弹出窗口填充时抛出异常：

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 创建模板 + 打开模板库

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle each Stashpad's pill to choose whether its notes contribute to cross-folder search. Excluded folders are still valid move destinations — their notes just don't appear in search results from elsewhere.
ast.target: 切换每个 Stashpad 的标记，以选择其笔记是否参与跨文件夹搜索。被排除的文件夹仍然是有效的移动目标——只是它们的笔记不会出现在其他地方的搜索结果中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Type a vault-relative folder path. The folder is created (with intermediates) and seeded with a Home note so Stashpad recognizes it.
ast.target: 输入一个相对于保险库的文件夹路径。该文件夹（包括中间文件夹）将被创建，并预置一个主页笔记，以便 Stashpad 识别它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folders you've pinned, downranked, or hidden in the Stashpad folder panel. Pin/downrank from a folder's right-click menu in the panel; restore here or from the panel's “Hidden” section.
ast.target: 您在 Stashpad 文件夹面板中置顶、降级或隐藏的文件夹。在面板中右键单击文件夹可进行置顶/降级；在此处或面板的“隐藏”部分可恢复。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Not set up yet in this vault.
ast.target: 在此保险库中尚未设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the shared password (ask whoever set it up — they'll send it via a password manager or secure message).
ast.target: 输入共享密码（请询问设置密码的人——他们将通过密码管理器或安全消息发送）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Request access — pick a password for THIS device, then ask an existing member to approve it. Once approved (and the keyfile syncs to you), you'll unlock with that password. No shared secret.
ast.target: 请求访问权限——为此设备选择一个密码，然后请现有成员批准。一旦批准（且密钥文件同步到您），您就可以使用该密码解锁。无需共享密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: An existing member needs to approve this device. After they do and the keyfile syncs here, reopen this page to unlock with the password you chose.
ast.target: 需要现有成员批准此设备。在他们批准且密钥文件同步到此处后，重新打开此页面以使用您选择的密码解锁。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Forget the password from memory until you re-enter it.
ast.target: 从内存中忘记密码，直到您重新输入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter your password to use encryption this session.
ast.target: 输入您的密码以在本次会话中使用加密。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Drops ONLY the copy saved in this device's keychain — your encryption stays set up and nothing is decrypted or deleted. You'll just re-type the password next session. (To turn encryption off entirely, use “Remove encryption” below.)
ast.target: 仅删除保存在此设备密钥链中的副本——您的加密设置保持不变，不会解密或删除任何内容。您只需在下次会话时重新输入密码。（要完全关闭加密，请使用下方的“移除加密”。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-wraps THIS device's key under a new password — doesn't re-encrypt files or affect other people.
ast.target: 使用新密码重新包装此设备的密钥——不会重新加密文件或影响其他人。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Erases the key from this vault. Refused while any locked notes exist — decrypt everything first (locked notes have NO plaintext copy; losing the key loses them forever).
ast.target: 擦除此保险库中的密钥。当存在任何锁定笔记时会被拒绝——请先解密所有内容（锁定笔记没有明文副本；丢失密钥将永久丢失它们）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: ON — anyone who knows it can unlock this vault (no approval). Share it via a password manager or secure message; don't send it in the clear.
ast.target: 开启——任何知道密码的人都可以解锁此保险库（无需批准）。通过密码管理器或安全消息分享；不要明文发送。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: OFF — set one passphrase that everyone types to unlock (the simplest way to share). Anyone who knows it can unlock; turning it off later doesn't claw back copies already synced elsewhere.
ast.target: 关闭——设置一个所有人都输入以解锁的密码短语（最简单的共享方式）。任何知道密码的人都可以解锁；稍后关闭不会收回已同步到其他地方的副本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scan the whole vault, or restrict to a single folder + its descendants.
ast.target: 扫描整个保险库，或限制为单个文件夹及其子项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path. Leave empty to fall back to the entire vault.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的路径。留空则回退到整个保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, notes inside any known Stashpad folder are excluded — the index destination shouldn't index itself, and other Stashpad folders are usually already organized. Toggle on if you want them included anyway.
ast.target: 默认情况下，任何已知的 Stashpad 文件夹内的笔记都会被排除——索引目标不应索引自身，且其他 Stashpad 文件夹通常已经组织好了。如果您仍希望包含它们，请开启此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required. Must be a Stashpad folder. The index hierarchy is built here. New notes are created; nothing is deleted.
ast.target: 必填。必须是一个 Stashpad 文件夹。索引层级结构将在此处构建。新笔记会被创建；不会删除任何内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Order of entries within the same depth. Natural: numbers first then alphabetical (recommended). Created: by source file's creation time — handy when prefixes are word-only and don't carry ordering.
ast.target: 同一深度内条目的排序方式。自然排序：数字优先，然后按字母顺序（推荐）。创建时间：按源文件的创建时间排序——当仅使用单词前缀且不带排序信息时很方便。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Preview aggressively overwrites the designated folder's HOME note body (frontmatter preserved). Build creates Stashpad notes (existing notes with the same jdPrefix are updated, not duplicated).
ast.target: 预览会强制覆盖指定文件夹的主页笔记正文（保留 frontmatter）。构建会创建 Stashpad 笔记（具有相同 jdPrefix 的现有笔记会被更新，而不是重复创建）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: No Stashpads discovered yet — create one above first.
ast.target: 尚未发现任何 Stashpad——请先在上方创建一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 要标记哪个 Stashpad 的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Google's open, vendor-neutral spec for sharing curated knowledge with agents.
ast.target: 谷歌开放、厂商中立的规范，用于与智能体共享策划知识。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your display name. Used in the note footer + as the author/contributor link target. Leave blank to opt out (notes won't be stamped).
ast.target: 您的显示名称。用于笔记页脚以及作为作者/贡献者链接的目标。留空表示选择退出（笔记将不会被标记）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stable id appended to your name on links so coworkers with the same name don't collide. Generated once and shouldn't change. If you really need to reset it, clear and retype your author name above.
ast.target: 附加到您链接名称上的稳定 ID，以防止同名同事发生冲突。生成一次后不应更改。如果您确实需要重置它，请清除并重新输入上方的作者名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Shown on your author page (e.g. "Engineer", "PM", "Designer").
ast.target: 可选。显示在您的作者页面上（例如“工程师”、“产品经理”、“设计师”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Shown on your author page (e.g. "Engineering", "Growth").
ast.target: 可选。显示在您的作者页面上（例如“工程部”、“增长部”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rebuild scans the whole vault to reconstruct the list. Restore regenerates any deleted author pages across every Stashpad folder.
ast.target: 重建会扫描整个保险库以重新生成列表。恢复会重新生成所有 Stashpad 文件夹中任何已删除的作者页面。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从保险库密钥文件同步

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在扫描中包含 Stashpad 文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 用于索引的指定 Stashpad 文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 每个 Stashpad 的颜色别名

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将 OKF 分配给文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在笔记页脚显示贡献者

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show last edit time in note footer
ast.target: 在笔记页脚显示最后编辑时间

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 每个 Stashpad 的笔记模板

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: _imports (leave blank to use the folder root)

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 选择要导入的 .stash 文件…

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 移动到哪个归档文件夹？

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 恢复哪个已删除的笔记？

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Choose a Stashpad folder to import into…
ast.target: 选择要导入到的 Stashpad 文件夹…

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Encryption: AES-256-GCM. Checking key-derivation suite for this device…
ast.target: 加密：AES-256-GCM。正在检查此设备的密钥派生套件…

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Encryption: AES-256-GCM with a password-derived key.
ast.target: 加密：AES-256-GCM，使用密码派生密钥。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Encryption: Argon2id + AES-256-GCM (falls back to PBKDF2 if Argon2 can't run here).
ast.target: 加密：Argon2id + AES-256-GCM（如果 Argon2 无法在此处运行，则回退到 PBKDF2）。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Saved only in this device's keychain — it doesn't sync to your other devices and isn't shared with anyone you send this file to. Keep the passphrase somewhere safe if you'll open this export elsewhere.
ast.target: 仅保存在此设备的钥匙串中——不会同步到您的其他设备，也不会与您发送此文件的任何人共享。如果您要在其他地方打开此导出文件，请将密码短语保存在安全的地方。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: ⚠️ If you lose this password, the export can't be recovered.
ast.target: ⚠️ 如果您丢失此密码，导出文件将无法恢复。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Enter a password to encrypt this export.
ast.target: 输入密码以加密此导出文件。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 加密：AES-256-GCM。正在检查密钥派生套件…

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Encryption: Argon2id + AES-256-GCM (PBKDF2 fallback if Argon2 can't run here).
ast.target: 加密：Argon2id + AES-256-GCM（如果 Argon2 无法在此处运行，则回退到 PBKDF2）。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Stored only in this device's keychain — doesn't sync to your other devices. Anyone with access to this unlocked device + keychain could decrypt.
ast.target: 仅存储在此设备的钥匙串中——不会同步到您的其他设备。任何能够访问此已解锁设备和钥匙串的人都可以解密。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Running Preview first writes a single Markdown file showing exactly what would be built (and what wouldn't), so you can sanity-check before committing.
ast.target: 运行预览会先写入一个单独的 Markdown 文件，精确显示将要构建的内容（以及不会构建的内容），以便您在提交前进行检查。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No pinned notes yet — right-click a note and choose “Pin to sidebar.”
ast.target: 尚无固定笔记——右键单击一个笔记并选择“固定到侧边栏”。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Set an author name in Stashpad settings to populate Shared.
ast.target: 在 Stashpad 设置中设置作者姓名以填充“共享”部分。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No shared notes match the current filters.
ast.target: 没有符合当前筛选条件的共享笔记。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No tasks yet — press H on a note to mark it a task, or D to give it a due date.
ast.target: 尚无任务——在笔记上按 H 将其标记为任务，或按 D 为其设置截止日期。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No tasks match the current filters.
ast.target: 没有符合当前筛选条件的任务。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No Stashpads found in this vault yet. A Stashpad is just a folder that contains a Stashpad-shaped note (frontmatter has both `id` and `parent`). Easiest way: open Stashpad (ribbon icon or command "Reveal or open Stashpad") — it auto-creates the default folder on first use. Or create one below.
ast.target: 在此保险库中尚未找到任何 Stashpad。Stashpad 只是一个包含 Stashpad 形状笔记的文件夹（其 frontmatter 同时包含 `id` 和 `parent`）。最简单的方法：打开 Stashpad（功能区图标或命令“显示或打开 Stashpad”）——首次使用时会自动创建默认文件夹。或者在下方创建一个。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Unlock encryption above to manage how this vault is shared.
ast.target: 请先解锁上方的加密，以管理此保险库的共享方式。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Everyone who can unlock this vault, and devices waiting for access. Approving a request shares the vault key with that device — it never sees a password. Removing a member revokes future access (existing synced copies they already hold aren't clawed back — rotate the key for that, a future feature).
ast.target: 所有能解锁此保险库的人，以及等待访问权限的设备。批准请求会将保险库密钥共享给该设备——它永远不会看到密码。移除成员会撤销其未来的访问权限（他们已持有的现有同步副本不会被收回——为此需要轮换密钥，这是未来的功能）。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Unlock encryption above to approve or remove collaborators.
ast.target: 解锁上方加密以批准或移除协作者。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 没有待处理的访问请求。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No folders customized yet. Right-click a folder in the Stashpad folder panel to pin, downrank, or hide it.
ast.target: 尚未自定义任何文件夹。在 Stashpad 文件夹面板中右键单击文件夹以置顶、降级或隐藏它。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在新 Stashpad 标签页中打开

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在编辑器中打开（新标签页）

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中显示

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 加密（锁定）文件夹中的所有笔记

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 解密（解锁）文件夹中的所有笔记

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在 Stashpad 中打开文件夹

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Overwrites the designated Stashpad folder's HOME note body with the preview.
ast.target: 将指定的 Stashpad 文件夹的主页笔记正文覆盖为预览内容。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Create the Stashpad-note hierarchy. Existing notes with matching jdPrefix are updated.
ast.target: 创建 Stashpad 笔记层级结构。具有匹配 jdPrefix 的现有笔记将被更新。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Open the designated Stashpad folder in your OS file browser.
ast.target: 在您的操作系统文件浏览器中打开指定的 Stashpad 文件夹。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Stashpad] Argon2id unavailable — encrypting with PBKDF2 fallback.
ast.target: [Stashpad] Argon2id 不可用 — 正在使用 PBKDF2 回退进行加密。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 无法将密码保存到钥匙串

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Stashpad] note changed since it was bundled — keeping plaintext
ast.target: [Stashpad] 笔记自打包后已更改 — 保留明文

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 无法写入锁定伴随文件

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 无法写入已删除伴随文件

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 无法写入回填伴随文件

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 跳过了不安全的回收站条目

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 前置信息同步计时失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 重新引导 fm 同步失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 声明：前置信息写入失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Stashpad] couldn't save export passphrase to secret storage
ast.target: [Stashpad] 无法将导出密码短语保存到安全存储

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Stashpad] home note rename failed; keeping legacy path
ast.target: [Stashpad] 主页笔记重命名失败；保留旧路径

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 模板 fm 覆盖失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Stashpad] author registry load failed; starting empty
ast.target: [Stashpad] 作者注册表加载失败；从空开始

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 替换：无法移除先前笔记

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Stashpad] import undo: couldn't restore replaced note
ast.target: [Stashpad] 导入撤销：无法恢复被替换的笔记

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Stashpad] render cache load failed; starting empty
ast.target: [Stashpad] 渲染缓存加载失败；从空开始

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 注入弹出窗口样式失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 取消隐藏叶子节点失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: Stashpad: Markdown 拖放采纳失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: Stashpad: 孤立项自动修复失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 跨文件夹移动时重新归位失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Stashpad: OKF rebuild during rebootstrap failed
ast.target: Stashpad: 重新引导期间 OKF 重建失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: Stashpad: 重新引导作者注册表重建失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: Stashpad: 附件链接转换失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Stashpad] cross-folder move: couldn't trash source note
ast.target: [Stashpad] 跨文件夹移动：无法将源笔记移入回收站

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Stashpad] cross-folder move: couldn't trash source attachment
ast.target: [Stashpad] 跨文件夹移动：无法将源附件移入回收站

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 无法更新 Obsidian 排除文件列表

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 加载通知历史记录失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 保存通知历史记录失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Stashpad] 保存最后光标位置失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: Stashpad: 孤立项修复失败于

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Move the cursor inside the text — neither end can be empty.
ast.target: 请将光标移至文本内部——两端均不能为空。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: That delimiter wouldn't split this note.
ast.target: 该分隔符无法拆分此笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 密码短语已复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Passphrase generated (hidden) — Show to view, or Copy to save it.
ast.target: 密码短语已生成（隐藏）——点击显示查看，或点击复制保存。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Generated — copy it somewhere safe; there's no recovery.
ast.target: 已生成——请将其复制到安全位置；无法恢复。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set a Designated Stashpad folder for Index first.
ast.target: 请先为索引设置指定的 Stashpad 文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No log yet — make some changes first.
ast.target: 暂无日志——请先进行一些更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Stashpad: couldn't open the panels view.
ast.target: Stashpad: 无法打开面板视图。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Encryption set up — unlocked for this session.
ast.target: 加密已设置——本次会话已解锁。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Access requested. An existing member can now approve this device.
ast.target: 访问请求已发送。现有成员现在可以批准此设备。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Removed from this device's keychain — encryption still set up.
ast.target: 已从此设备的钥匙串中移除——加密设置仍然存在。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Can't remove encryption: locked/encrypted-deleted notes still exist and would be lost forever. Run "Decrypt (unlock) ALL locked notes in the vault" and empty the encrypted trash first.
ast.target: 无法移除加密：仍存在已锁定/加密删除的笔记，它们将永久丢失。请先运行“解密（解锁）保险库中所有已锁定笔记”并清空加密回收站。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Locked notes appeared while this dialog was open — removal cancelled. Decrypt everything first.
ast.target: 此对话框打开期间出现了已锁定笔记——移除操作已取消。请先解密所有内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Shared password set — share it securely with your collaborators.
ast.target: 共享密码已设置——请与您的协作者安全共享。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Reveal in file system not supported on this platform.
ast.target: 此平台不支持在文件系统中显示。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open a Stashpad view to add notes.
ast.target: 打开一个 Stashpad 视图来添加笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Stashpad: couldn't open the detail panel.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set your author name in Stashpad settings first.
ast.target: 请先在 Stashpad 设置中设置您的作者名称。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Nothing to claim — those notes are already authored by you.
ast.target: 无需认领——这些笔记的作者已经是您了。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可导出的笔记（未附加文件）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No .stash files found in this vault.
ast.target: 在此保险库中未找到 .stash 文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Stashpad: this Obsidian build doesn't expose openPopoutLeaf.
ast.target: Stashpad：此 Obsidian 版本未暴露 openPopoutLeaf。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select mode: tap notes to add, press ⚡ for actions
ast.target: 选择模式：点击笔记以添加，按 ⚡ 执行操作

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Can't paste a cut note into the note you're cutting.
ast.target: 无法将剪切的笔记粘贴到正在剪切的笔记中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请先设置加密（设置 → 加密）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可锁定的内容（已锁定）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No archive folder available. Mark a folder as archive first (folder panel → right-click → “Mark as archive”).
ast.target: 没有可用的归档文件夹。请先将一个文件夹标记为归档（文件夹面板 → 右键单击 → “标记为归档”）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No locked notes to unlock here.
ast.target: 此处没有可解锁的已锁定笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请选择 2 个或更多笔记以进行合并。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The note clipboard is empty — copy or cut notes first.
ast.target: 笔记剪贴板为空——请先复制或剪切笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Can't paste cut notes under themselves.
ast.target: 无法将剪切的笔记粘贴到其自身下方。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cross-Stashpad templates aren't supported yet — pick a note from this Stashpad.
ast.target: 暂不支持跨 Stashpad 模板——请从此 Stashpad 中选择一个笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可打开的聚焦父级。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可安排日程的内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 重新排序需要选择单个父级。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可重新排序的内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: “Encrypt items sent to trash” is ON but encryption isn't set up (Settings → Encryption). Nothing was deleted.
ast.target: “加密发送到回收站的项目”已开启，但加密未设置（设置 → 加密）。未删除任何内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请选择一个要拆分的笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Note is too short to split.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Split would leave one part empty.
ast.target: 拆分会导致其中一部分为空。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Split would leave the first part empty.
ast.target: 拆分会导致第一部分为空。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Pick a note first (move the cursor onto it).
ast.target: 请先选择一个笔记（将光标移至其上）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Already at Home — no parent to swap with.
ast.target: 已在主页——没有可交换的父级。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 交换中止：父子关系已更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 文件资源管理器不可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 重命名失败（请查看控制台）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Stashpad: couldn't open the folder panel.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 删除失败（请查看控制台）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 撤销失败（请查看控制台）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Enable “Performance profiling” in Stashpad settings first, then use the app and run this again.
ast.target: 请先在 Stashpad 设置中启用“性能分析”，然后使用应用并再次运行此操作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Performance profile copied to clipboard (also in the console).
ast.target: 性能分析已复制到剪贴板（同时也在控制台中）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Integrity check complete — see Stashpad log.
ast.target: 完整性检查完成——请查看 Stashpad 日志。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set a Designated Stashpad folder for Index in settings first.
ast.target: 请先在设置中为索引设置一个指定的 Stashpad 文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Reload Obsidian (close + reopen) to apply the Stashpad update.
ast.target: 请重新加载 Obsidian（关闭 + 重新打开）以应用 Stashpad 更新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Stashpad: couldn't open popout window on this build.
ast.target: Stashpad：无法在此版本上打开弹出窗口。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Nothing to lock in this folder.
ast.target: 此文件夹中没有可锁定的内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No locked notes in this folder.
ast.target: 此文件夹中没有已锁定的笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No locked notes anywhere in the vault.
ast.target: 保险库中任何地方都没有已锁定的笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: That note isn't a Stashpad note.
ast.target: 该笔记不是 Stashpad 笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No authors or Stashpad folders to sync.
ast.target: 没有可同步的作者或 Stashpad 文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Stashpad folders to import into.
ast.target: 没有可导入的 Stashpad 文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到 Stashpad 文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Nothing to fix — every note in a Stashpad folder already has id + parent + created.
ast.target: 无需修复——Stashpad 文件夹中的每个笔记都已具有 id、parent 和 created。

ast.name: aria-label
ast.target: 在 Stashpad 标签页中打开

ast.name: body
ast.source: This erases the encryption key for this vault. Nothing is currently encrypted (locked notes are checked), so no content is lost — but you'll need to set a new password to encrypt later, and anything you had exported encrypted with this key stays locked to its passphrase.
ast.target: 这将擦除此保险库的加密密钥。当前没有内容被加密（已检查锁定笔记），因此不会丢失任何内容——但您需要设置新密码才能在以后加密，并且您已使用此密钥导出的任何内容仍会锁定在其密码短语上。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Confirmations after a new note is created.
ast.target: 创建新笔记后的确认提示。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 编辑相关的提示（目前较少）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Confirmations after deleting one or more notes.
ast.target: 删除一个或多个笔记后的确认提示。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: After reparenting or moving notes between folders.
ast.target: 在文件夹之间重新分配或移动笔记后。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: After combining multiple notes into one.
ast.target: 将多个笔记合并为一个后。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: After splitting a note in two.
ast.target: 将一个笔记拆分为两个后。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a note is marked complete.
ast.target: 当笔记被标记为完成时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a note's complete mark is removed.
ast.target: 当笔记的完成标记被移除时。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 拖拽重排和键盘上移/下移/置顶/置底。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Cross-author activity (someone else touched your notes or vice versa).
ast.target: 跨作者活动（其他人修改了你的笔记，反之亦然）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Task due-date reminders — surfaced when a task comes due (fired at launch / periodically).
ast.target: 任务截止日期提醒——在任务到期时显示（启动时/定期触发）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Plumbing toasts: backfill progress, integrity warnings, errors not tied to a verb.
ast.target: 系统提示：回填进度、完整性警告、未关联到具体操作的错误。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open a fuzzy picker to choose the new parent.
ast.target: 打开模糊选择器以选择新的父级。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Highlight a note in the list with arrows; Enter sets it as parent.
ast.target: 在列表中用箭头高亮笔记；按回车键将其设为父级。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Concatenate selected notes into the oldest one.
ast.target: 将选定的笔记合并到最旧的那一个中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Copy selected note bodies to clipboard.
ast.target: 将选定笔记的正文复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Copy the focused note + all descendants, indented.
ast.target: 复制当前聚焦的笔记及其所有子级，带缩进。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open the cursor row (or focused note) in a regular Obsidian markdown tab.
ast.target: 在常规的 Obsidian Markdown 标签页中打开光标所在行（或聚焦的笔记）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open the cursor row (or focused note) in a new Stashpad tab focused on it.
ast.target: 在新的 Stashpad 标签页中打开光标所在行（或聚焦的笔记），并聚焦于它。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Split the cursor row (or focused note) into two notes at a chosen line.
ast.target: 在选定的行将光标所在行（或聚焦的笔记）拆分为两个笔记。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Copy selection (or cursor row) as a nested ![[embed]] outline.
ast.target: 将选区（或光标所在行）复制为嵌套的 ![[embed]] 大纲。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Mod+Alt+F (Mod+Shift+F is taken by Obsidian's global search).
ast.target: 默认：Mod+Alt+F（Mod+Shift+F 已被 Obsidian 的全局搜索占用）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Mod+Z (Stashpad-only — won't fire while typing in the composer).
ast.target: 默认：Mod+Z（仅限 Stashpad——在编辑器中输入时不会触发）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Mod+Enter or X — marks selected/focused notes as complete (both chords active).
ast.target: 默认：Mod+Enter 或 X——将选定/聚焦的笔记标记为完成（两种组合键均有效）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Mod+[ — re-parents the selection one level up.
ast.target: 默认：Mod+[ —— 将选区向上提升一级。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Shift+: or ; — open the color picker for the selection (both chords active).
ast.target: 默认：Shift+: 或 ; —— 为选区打开颜色选择器（两种组合键均有效）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Mod+Shift+D — clone selected notes (with their subtrees) as siblings.
ast.target: 默认：Mod+Shift+D —— 将选定笔记（及其子树）作为同级项克隆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Pick any note in this Stashpad; clone it (with subtree + attachments) into the current view, retimestamped.
ast.target: 在此 Stashpad 中选择任意笔记；将其（连同子树和附件）克隆到当前视图中，并重新设置时间戳。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Shift+? — toggle the clamp on the cursor row (or every selected row).
ast.target: 默认：Shift+? —— 切换光标所在行（或所有选定行）的折叠状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Export the selected subtree(s) as a .stash bundle (notes + attachments).
ast.target: 将选定的子树导出为 .stash 包（笔记+附件）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open the .stash bundle picker and import its notes into this Stashpad.
ast.target: 打开 .stash 包选择器，并将其笔记导入到此 Stashpad 中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Mod+S — opens the unified folder picker (reveal, switch, create, convert).
ast.target: 默认：Mod+S —— 打开统一的文件夹选择器（显示、切换、创建、转换）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open a second tab on the same folder + focus, mirroring the "copy" button in the focused-header actions.
ast.target: 在同一文件夹+焦点上打开第二个标签页，镜像聚焦标题操作中的“复制”按钮。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Mod+A — adds every visible row to the selection.
ast.target: 默认：Mod+A —— 将所有可见行添加到选区。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: { — copy the contents of the cursor row's first codeblock (or pick one when multiple exist).
ast.target: 默认：{ —— 复制光标所在行第一个代码块的内容（如果存在多个则选择一个）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Promote the cursor row above its current parent; the parent slides under it (carrying its other children). No default — bind in this tab.
ast.target: 将光标所在行提升到其当前父级之上；父级滑到其下方（携带其其他子级）。无默认值——在此标签页中绑定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: P — toggle the sidebar pin state of the cursor row (or focused note).
ast.target: 默认：P —— 切换光标所在行（或聚焦笔记）的侧边栏固定状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: H — mark the selection (or cursor row) as a task / todo, or clear it. Tasks appear in the Tasks panel.
ast.target: 默认：H —— 将选区（或光标所在行）标记为任务/待办事项，或清除标记。任务会显示在任务面板中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: D — open a date+time picker to set (or clear) the due date on the selection. Setting a due date also marks the note as a task.
ast.target: 默认：D —— 打开日期+时间选择器以设置（或清除）选区的截止日期。设置截止日期也会将笔记标记为任务。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Home — move the cursor to the first note in the current list.
ast.target: 默认：Home —— 将光标移动到当前列表中的第一个笔记。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: End — move the cursor to the last note in the current list.
ast.target: 默认：End —— 将光标移动到当前列表中的最后一个笔记。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default: Mod+K — open a command palette listing only Stashpad's commands, with Sift search.
ast.target: 默认：Mod+K —— 打开仅列出 Stashpad 命令的命令面板，支持 Sift 搜索。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Encrypt the selected note(s) + their children into a locked .stashenc bundle in place (prompts to unlock first if needed). No default chord.
ast.target: 将选定笔记及其子级加密为锁定的 .stashenc 包（如果需要，会提示先解锁）。无默认组合键。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Decrypt every locked stash shown in the current view back into place, skipping any that can't be read. No default chord.
ast.target: 将当前视图中显示的所有锁定笔记解密回原位，跳过任何无法读取的笔记。无默认组合键。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Move the selected note(s) to the default archive folder, encrypted on arrival. Undoable. No default chord.
ast.target: 将选定笔记移动到默认的存档文件夹，到达时加密。可撤销。无默认组合键。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Send the selected note(s) to the encrypted trash (recoverable with your password, Ctrl/Cmd+Z undoable). No default chord.
ast.target: 将选定笔记发送到加密回收站（可通过密码恢复，Ctrl/Cmd+Z 可撤销）。无默认组合键。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Copy the selected note(s) as NOTES: paste in the list to duplicate them (new ids), or anywhere else to paste their text. Skipped when text is highlighted (normal copy wins).
ast.target: 将选定笔记复制为 NOTES：在列表中粘贴以复制它们（新 ID），或在其他任何地方粘贴其文本。当文本被高亮时跳过（普通复制优先）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Cut the selected note(s): paste in the list to MOVE them, or in the composer to extract their text and delete the originals (undoable).
ast.target: 剪切选定笔记：在列表中粘贴以移动它们，或在编辑器中粘贴以提取其文本并删除原件（可撤销）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Paste previously copied/cut notes at the cursor row (after it, same parent). Does nothing if the note clipboard is empty.
ast.target: 将先前复制/剪切的笔记粘贴到光标所在行（之后，同一父级）。如果笔记剪贴板为空则不执行任何操作。

ast.name: label
ast.target: 在新 Stashpad 标签页中打开

ast.name: label
ast.target: 插入模板（克隆现有笔记）

ast.name: label
ast.target: 显示更多/显示更少（展开切换）

ast.name: label
ast.target: 将选中项导出为 .stash 文件

ast.name: label
ast.target: 打开/切换/创建 Stashpad 文件夹

ast.name: label
ast.target: 克隆（复制）此 Stashpad 标签页

ast.name: label
ast.target: 选择视图中的所有笔记

ast.name: label
ast.target: 置顶/取消置顶选中笔记

ast.name: label
ast.target: 解密（解锁）视图中的锁定笔记

ast.name: label
ast.target: 将选中项移至归档（加密）

ast.name: label
ast.source: Open folder in a new tab…
ast.target: 在新标签页中打开文件夹…

ast.name: label
ast.target: 搜索已排除的 Stashpad 文件夹

ast.name: label
ast.target: 复制时添加时间戳前缀

ast.name: label
ast.target: 使用模板插件的日期/时间格式

ast.name: label
ast.source: Auto-navigate into parent on move IN
ast.target: 移入时自动导航至父级

ast.name: label
ast.source: Auto-navigate to destination on move OUT
ast.target: 移出时自动导航至目标位置

ast.name: label
ast.source: Offer to delete attachments with note
ast.target: 删除笔记时一并删除附件

ast.name: label
ast.target: 发送后自动聚焦编辑器

ast.name: label
ast.source: Open in new window — duplicate tab
ast.target: 在新窗口中打开 — 复制标签页

ast.name: label
ast.source: Expand the cursor row's body automatically
ast.target: 自动展开光标所在行的正文

ast.name: label
ast.source: Double-click a note to open it

ast.name: message
ast.source: Can't move a note into itself.
ast.target: 无法将笔记移入其自身。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在新标签页中打开 Stashpad

ast.name: name
ast.target: 聚焦上一个 Stashpad 标签页

ast.name: name
ast.target: 加密（锁定）选中项（笔记及子项）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 解密（解锁）视图中的已锁定笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Decrypt (unlock) ALL locked notes in the vault
ast.target: 解密（解锁）保险库中所有已锁定笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Copy notes (note clipboard — paste to duplicate)
ast.target: 复制笔记（笔记剪贴板 — 粘贴以复制）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Cut notes (paste in list to move, in composer to extract text)
ast.target: 剪切笔记（在列表中粘贴以移动，在编辑器中粘贴以提取文本）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 粘贴笔记（从笔记剪贴板）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中项移至归档（加密）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 加密并删除选中项（移至加密回收站）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开加密回收站（恢复已删除项）…

ast.name: name
ast.source: Encrypt existing Obsidian trash (backfill .trash into encrypted trash)
ast.target: 加密现有 Obsidian 回收站（将 .trash 回填至加密回收站）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Close duplicate & orphaned Stashpad tabs (tidy up)
ast.target: 关闭重复及孤立的 Stashpad 标签页（整理）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 认领选中笔记的所有权

ast.name: name
ast.source: Claim authorship of all unauthored notes in this folder
ast.target: 认领此文件夹中所有无主笔记的所有权

ast.name: name
ast.source: Claim selected notes (author if unowned, else add me as contributor)
ast.target: 认领选中笔记（若无主则成为作者，否则添加我为贡献者）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Claim all notes in this folder (author if unowned, else add me as contributor)
ast.target: 认领此文件夹中所有笔记（若无主则成为作者，否则添加我为贡献者）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 为下一条笔记选择目标位置

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在新标签页中编辑笔记（选中项）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Edit parent note in new tab
ast.target: 在新标签页中编辑父笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 克隆选中项（复制/复制笔记）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 插入模板（克隆现有笔记）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 显示更多/显示更少（展开切换）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 移动（列表内，方向键 + 回车）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在新 Stashpad 标签页中打开

ast.name: name
ast.target: 导出性能分析（复制到剪贴板）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Import loose files & folders in this folder (scan for moved-in / unprocessed items)
ast.target: 导入此文件夹中的松散文件和文件夹（扫描移入/未处理项）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Re-run filename (slug) pass on this folder
ast.target: 对此文件夹重新运行文件名（slug）处理

ast.name: name
ast.source: Re-run frontmatter backfill (recovery links) on this folder
ast.target: 对此文件夹重新运行前置信息回填（恢复链接）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开 Stashpad 面板（侧边栏）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开文件夹面板（侧边栏）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开 Stashpad 详情面板（右侧边栏）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在 Stashpad 中打开此笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 固定/取消固定选中笔记（侧边栏）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 克隆（复制/复制）此 Stashpad 标签页

ast.name: name
ast.target: 撤销上一个 Stashpad 操作

ast.name: name
ast.target: 重做上一个已撤销的 Stashpad 操作

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中项导出为 .stash 文件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中项导出为 OKF 包（.zip / .tar.gz / .stash）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Run integrity check on active Stashpad folder
ast.target: 对活动的 Stashpad 文件夹运行完整性检查

ast.name: name
ast.source: Set missing parents to Home (orphan fix)
ast.target: 将缺失的父项设为 Home（修复孤立项）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rebuild author registry (scan authors + note frontmatter)
ast.target: 重建作者注册表（扫描作者 + 笔记 frontmatter）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 恢复缺失的作者存根（从注册表）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 跨所有文件夹同步作者（多人协作）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rebootstrap all Stashpad folders (backfill metadata + rename stale titles)
ast.target: 重新引导所有 Stashpad 文件夹（回填元数据 + 重命名过时标题）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Adopt active note into Stashpad (fill missing frontmatter)
ast.target: 将活动笔记纳入 Stashpad（填充缺失的 frontmatter）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Preview JD index (overwrites home note body)
ast.target: 预览 JD 索引（覆盖 Home 笔记正文）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Build JD index notes (creates Stashpad-note hierarchy)
ast.target: 构建 JD 索引笔记（创建 Stashpad 笔记层级结构）

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Add a person — type a name…
ast.target: 添加人员 — 输入姓名…

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Send next note(s) under which note?
ast.target: 将下一个笔记发送到哪个笔记下？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Insert which note as a template?
ast.target: 插入哪个笔记作为模板？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Remember in this vault (this device) — skips the prompt when you re-import here.
ast.target: 在此保险库中记住（此设备）— 重新导入时跳过提示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This export is password-protected. Enter its password to import it.
ast.target: 此导出受密码保护。请输入密码以导入。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This single password protects everything you encrypt in this vault. It is stored only on this device. There is NO recovery — if you lose it, anything you've encrypted is gone for good.
ast.target: 此单一密码保护您在此保险库中加密的所有内容。它仅存储在此设备上。无法恢复 — 如果丢失，您加密的任何内容都将永久丢失。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Remember on this device (keychain) — auto-unlock here without re-typing.
ast.target: 在此设备上记住（钥匙串）— 无需重新输入即可自动解锁。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Encryption is in beta — keep your own backups of anything important.
ast.target: 加密功能处于测试阶段 — 请自行备份重要数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Give each per-note color a friendly name. Filters and pickers display the alias instead of the hex code; the underlying color stays the same. The same hex in two Stashpads can have different aliases.
ast.target: 为每个笔记颜色设置友好名称。过滤器和选择器显示别名而非十六进制代码；底层颜色保持不变。两个 Stashpad 中相同的十六进制代码可以有不同的别名。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No authored or contributed folders yet.
ast.target: 尚无已创建或已贡献的文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: How to use OKF in a folder:
ast.target: 如何在文件夹中使用 OKF：

ast.name: text
ast.source: OKF frontmatter + index.md refresh automatically a few seconds after you add, move, or delete notes — NOT instantly. Use Rebuild for an immediate pass.
ast.target: OKF frontmatter + index.md 会在您添加、移动或删除笔记后几秒钟自动刷新 — 并非即时生效。使用“重建”可立即执行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Stamp each new note with your name. If the vault is later shared (e.g. a coworker opens it with --config pointing at their own settings folder), every modification automatically tracks contributors on top of the original author. Names link to per-user pages in <stashpad>/_authors/.
ast.target: 为每个新笔记盖上您的姓名。如果保险库后来被共享（例如，同事使用指向其自己设置文件夹的 --config 打开它），每次修改都会自动在原始作者的基础上跟踪贡献者。姓名链接到 <stashpad>/_authors/ 中的用户页面。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A rebuildable cache of every author Stashpad has seen, with rename history. Not a source of truth — the author id stored in each note is authoritative. Use it to recover deleted author pages or audit name changes.
ast.target: Stashpad 见过的所有作者的可重建缓存，包含重命名历史。并非权威来源 — 每个笔记中存储的作者 ID 才是权威。可用于恢复已删除的作者页面或审计姓名更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No authors recorded yet. Rebuild to scan the vault.
ast.target: 尚未记录作者。请重建以扫描保险库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No Stashpad note selected. Cursor or click a note in a Stashpad list to inspect it here.
ast.target: 未选择 Stashpad 笔记。请在 Stashpad 列表中光标定位或点击一个笔记以在此处检查。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Include folders you've excluded from search (e.g. to move a note there).
ast.target: 包含您已从搜索中排除的文件夹（例如，将笔记移动到那里）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No notes here yet. Type below to add one.
ast.target: 此处尚无笔记。请在下方输入以添加。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Sort applies only in Nested view.
ast.target: 排序仅在嵌套视图中适用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Hide notes marked complete. A completed parent stays visible while any descendant is still incomplete.
ast.target: 隐藏标记为完成的笔记。当任何后代仍未完成时，已完成的父项保持可见。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Show only notes that have an attachment. A parent stays visible while any descendant has one.
ast.target: 仅显示有附件的笔记。当任何后代有附件时，父项保持可见。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Show only notes that came in via import.
ast.target: 仅显示通过导入添加的笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use calendar boundaries (start of today/week/month/year). Off = rolling windows back from now.
ast.target: 使用日历边界（今天/本周/本月/今年的开始）。关闭 = 从现在开始向前滚动的时间窗口。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Nothing in the encrypted trash. Notes you securely delete land here, recoverable with your password.
ast.target: 加密回收站为空。您安全删除的笔记会存放在此处，可通过密码恢复。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Nothing pinned yet — pin a note or folder from its right-click menu.
ast.target: 暂无置顶项 — 从笔记或文件夹的右键菜单中置顶。
